titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Student Records IMPORT 2018-12-03T15:01:10.113-05:00
Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Student Records IMPORT 2018-12-03T15:01:10.113-05:00
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday December 4, 2018 at 08:02

did.unittitle: Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, student records IMPORT 2018-12-03T15:01:10.113-05:00
did.abstract: The records consist of student records maintained by the Yale Graduate School of Arts and Sciences.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 25-F (YRG 25-F), Student records of the Yale Graduate School.

accessrestrict.head: Information about Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Cite As
prefercite.p: Graduate School of Arts and Sciences, Yale University, Student Records (RU 262). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Notes
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: Several files were removed from various accessions for a project undertaken by the Registrar's office. Some folders were not returned to their original locations and were assigned a separate accession, 19ND-A-440.

scopecontent.head: Description of the Papers
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student records maintained by the Yale Graduate School of Arts and Sciences.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.
